Terra Draw 1.32.1 and Terra Draw MapLibre GL Adapter 1.4.1
Copyright (c) James Gardner and contributors
License: MIT
Source: https://github.com/JamesLMilner/terra-draw

Bundled locally for the Robotaxi operating-space editor. The libraries provide
geometry drawing and MapLibre integration only; Robotaxi business validation,
versioning and publishing remain in the project service layer.
